metrolink: Events are taking place across Greater Manchester this weekend; services may be busier than usual. To plan your journey visit www.tfgm.com
headlines: Intel starts cooking up enhanced 18A-P silicon for would-be foundry customers
Windows devs rerolled old code to save precious bytes
UK.gov links up with LinkedIn for jobs market intel from 40M accounts

crew_quote: "Lovely weather for a stroll, but not too hot for a curry, right? Just don’t let it distract you from that enhanced silicon—those bytes won't save themselves!"
